summary: Russian forces launched multiple Shahed drone strikes on Poltava and Kremenchuk, with several drones redirecting mid-flight. Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Lugansk regions used for Russian logistics. Putin stated he received new proposals to limit combat operations to four territories and halt deep strikes, citing Ukrainian personnel shortages.
key_points: Four Shahed drones targeted Poltava, with all drones subsequently redirecting course toward Kremenchuk. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68163, @mon1tor_ua/68171)
Ukrainian forces struck an automobile bridge near Novoazovsk in Donetsk region and two railway bridges in Lugansk region used for personnel and equipment transfers. (Source: @UkraineNow/82268)
Russian tactical aviation launched repeated guided aviation bomb strikes on the city of Zaporozhye. (Source: @kpszsu/66829, @kpszsu/66830)
Putin stated he received proposals to halt deep strikes on both sides and limit combat to Kherson, Zaporozhye, DNR, and LNR territories. (Source: @UkraineNow/82260)

In the Zaporozhye region, energy facilities were damaged and emergency power outages affected a significant part of the region; all districts of Kherson region are completely or partially without power. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian Army Group 'East' liberated the settlement of Pysantsy in the Dnepropetrovsk direction, advancing along the Vovcha River bed. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In the eastern Zaporozhye region, Russian forces took the settlement of Novoselovka, with Egorovka as the next objective north of Mala Tokmachka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
A kamikaze drone struck a regular bus in the village of Petryatinka, Bryansk region, wounding a woman. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

sections.executive_summary: Russian forces launched multiple Shahed drone strikes on Poltava and Kremenchuk, with several drones redirecting mid-flight. Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Lugansk regions used for Russian logistics. Putin stated he received new proposals to limit combat operations to four territories and halt deep strikes, citing Ukrainian personnel shortages.

points: Ukrainian forces struck an automobile bridge near Novoazovsk in Donetsk region and two railway bridges in Lugansk region, which the enemy uses for transferring personnel, weapons, ammunition, and materiel. (Source: @UkraineNow/82268)

Ukraine faces power outages due to abnormal heat; Yasno CEO Sergey Kovalenko stated every additional 3°C in Kiev increases grid load by approximately 100 MW, compounding strain on war-damaged infrastructure. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31234)
Ukrainian drone activity included three groups of UAVs from Donetsk region toward Yurievka, and four UAVs from Kharkiv region toward Valki/Kov'yagi. (Source: @eRadarrua/98734, @eRadarrua/98732)
Ukrainian drones targeted the Lymanka area in Odessa region from the Black Sea coastal waters. (Source: @kpszsu/66813)

Deputy Speaker of the Polish Sejm Krzysztof Bosak stated continued funding of the Kiev regime is disgraceful, accusing Ukraine of pursuing an anti-Polish policy and banning exhumation of Volyn massacre victims. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31246)

China rejected Ukraine's request for a debt deferment in May 2026; Ukraine's budget deficit stands at 18.5% of GDP, and Zelensky signed a 2024 law suspending repayment of external debt to non-Western countries. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31256)
Russian tactical aviation launched repeated guided aviation bomb strikes on the city of Zaporozhye. (Source: @kpszsu/66829, @kpszsu/66830)
Russian forces conducted intensive drone strikes on Kharkov, Sumy, Pavlovgrad, and Nikolayev region overnight. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

Russian Army Group 'North' continues offensive operations in Kazachya Lopan and adjacent forest areas on the Kharkov direction, and small-arms fighting continues in Losevka, Ukrainske, Zemlyanoy Yar, and Petro-Ivanovka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian forces destroyed a bridge over the Senek River from the Kupyansk direction using an FAB strike to complicate enemy logistics. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

Russian forces continue assault operations in urban areas of Krasny Liman and Konstantinovka; Russian artillery destroyed a Ukrainian military shelter in Konstantinovka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237, @ukr_leaks_eng/31242)
Russia's UN mission demanded the Secretary-General condemn Ukrainian strikes on a bus carrying Belarusians, calling the lack of UN response disappointing. (Source: @tass_agency/382967)
Russian Army Group 'East' liberated the settlement of Pysantsy in the Dnepropetrovsk direction, advancing along the Vovcha River bed. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In the eastern Zaporozhye region, Russian forces took the settlement of Novoselovka; Egorovka, located north of Mala Tokmachka, is the next objective. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian forces continue assault operations in urban areas of Krasny Liman and Konstantinovka, with the enemy responding with numerous drone strikes. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian forces destroyed a bridge over the Senek River from the Kupyansk direction using an FAB strike to complicate enemy logistics. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian artillery destroyed a Ukrainian military shelter in Konstantinovka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31242)
In the DNR, three residents were killed and 13 wounded from Ukrainian UAV strikes since the beginning of the day, according to head of republic Pushilin. (Source: @tass_agency/382979)

On the Sumy direction, Army Group 'North' assault troops continue small-arms battles in Bachevsk and surroundings in Shostka district, and fighting in Pysarevka, Marino, and Novaya Sech in Sumy district. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

In the Belgorod region's Rakitnyansky district, an FPV drone attacked a commercial facility in Proletarsky, causing a woman barotrauma; settlements Vyazovoye, Nizhneye Berezovo-Vtoroye, Gora-Podol, Proletarsky, Dolgoye, Oktyabrsky, and Berezovka were under attack. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In the Bryansk region, a kamikaze drone struck a regular bus in the village of Petryatinka, Zlynkovsky district, wounding a woman. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
At least three UAVs were detected along the border toward Dobryanku in Chernigov region. (Source: @eRadarrua/98708, @eRadarrua/98707)

Russian Army Group 'North' continues offensive operations in Kazachya Lopan and adjacent forest areas on the Kharkov direction; AFU assault units made several unsuccessful counterattacks near Otradnogo. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In the Zaporozhye region, energy facilities were damaged and emergency power outages affected a significant part of the region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
All districts of the neighboring Kherson region are completely or partially without power. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

Crimea and Sevastopol repelled an attack; air raid warnings were sounding again in Sevastopol by morning with at least two UAVs shot down, and the Crimean Bridge has been closed since the night. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
A Ukrainian strike hit a bus depot in the Kherson region, destroying civilian vehicles including 14 school buses. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian tactical aviation launched repeated guided aviation bomb strikes on the city of Zaporozhye. (Source: @kpszsu/66829, @kpszsu/66830)
Ukrainian drones targeted the Lymanka area in Odessa region from the Black Sea coastal waters. (Source: @kpszsu/66813)
Four Shahed drones targeted Poltava, with all drones subsequently redirecting course toward Kremenchuk. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68163, @mon1tor_ua/68171)
Three Shahed drones were reported heading toward Kremenchuk. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68160)
A group of attack UAVs from Kharkiv region headed toward Poltava from the southern direction. (Source: @kpszsu/66839)
A group of strike UAVs from Kharkiv region headed toward Poltava. (Source: @kpszsu/66837)
Three groups of UAVs from the direction of Dobropolye in Donetsk region headed toward the border of regions in the direction of Yurievka. (Source: @eRadarrua/98734)
Four UAVs from the north headed toward Valki/Kov'yagi in Kharkiv region. (Source: @eRadarrua/98732)
At least three UAVs were detected along the border toward Dobryanku in Chernigov region. (Source: @eRadarrua/98708, @eRadarrua/98707)

key_developments: Four Shahed drones targeted Poltava, then all redirected course toward Kremenchuk, indicating possible Ukrainian air defense pressure or Russian targeting adjustments. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68163, @mon1tor_ua/68171)

Ukrainian forces struck an automobile bridge near Novoazovsk in Donetsk region and two railway bridges in Lugansk region, disrupting Russian logistics for personnel, weapons, and materiel transfers. (Source: @UkraineNow/82268)

Putin stated he received proposals to halt deep strikes on both sides and limit combat to Kherson, Zaporozhye, DNR, and LNR, claiming the reason is catastrophic Ukrainian personnel shortages. (Source: @UkraineNow/82260)

Russian Army Group 'East' liberated Pysantsy in the Dnepropetrovsk direction along the Vovcha River, and Russian forces took Novoselovka in eastern Zaporozhye region with Egorovka as next objective. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

Energy facilities in Zaporozhye region were damaged causing widespread outages; all districts of Kherson region are completely or partially without power following overnight Ukrainian strikes. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

Russian tactical aviation launched repeated guided aviation bomb strikes on Zaporozhye, while Russian drone strikes targeted Kharkov, Sumy, Pavlovgrad, and Nikolayev region. (Source: @kpszsu/66829, @kpszsu/66830, @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

A kamikaze drone struck a regular bus in Petryatinka village, Bryansk region, wounding a woman; in Belgorod region an FPV drone attacked a commercial facility in Proletarsky causing barotrauma to a woman. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
sections.threat_assessment: The operational tempo remains high across multiple axes, with Russia maintaining pressure through Shahed drone strikes on Poltava and Kremenchuk and repeated guided bomb strikes on Zaporozhye. Ukrainian forces are actively targeting Russian logistics infrastructure, striking three bridges in Donetsk and Lugansk regions. The Sumy and Kharkov directions see continued ground engagements with Russian Army Group 'North' advancing in multiple settlements. Civilian infrastructure remains at risk on both sides, with energy outages in Zaporozhye and Kherson regions and drone strikes on civilian vehicles in Russian border regions.
sections.regional_response: Polish Deputy Speaker Krzysztof Bosak publicly condemned continued funding of Ukraine, citing anti-Polish policies and the Volyn massacre exhumation ban, signaling potential friction in Polish-Ukrainian relations. China formally rejected Ukraine's debt deferment request, with Ukraine's budget deficit at 18.5% of GDP and a 2024 law suspending non-Western debt repayments straining creditor relations. Russia's UN mission demanded the Secretary-General condemn Ukrainian strikes on a bus carrying Belarusians, using the incident for diplomatic pressure.
sections.intelligence_notes: The drone redirect from Poltava to Kremenchuk suggests either Ukrainian air defense displacement or deliberate Russian target reassessment mid-flight. Putin's public acknowledgment of ceasefire proposals limiting combat to four territories may indicate exploratory diplomatic signaling, though he framed the proposal as originating from the Ukrainian side due to personnel shortages. The destruction of the Senek River bridge by FAB strike and three occupied-territory bridges by Ukraine highlights logistics nodes as priority targets for both sides. Local resistance to military commissars was filmed in Krivoy Rog and Zaporozhye, suggesting domestic mobilization pressures.
